MindSpore error 'got an unexpected keyword argument "unbiased"' occurs because MindSpore uses 'correction' instead of 'unbiased' (per docs: correction=1 corresponds to unbiased=True, correction=0 to unbiased=False). Also, MindSpore does not support dtype float64 — only float16/float32 per documentation. Thus, repair requires: (1) fix dim to valid value (e.g., 0 or -1), (2) replace 'unbiased' with 'correction' in both frameworks (with correction=1 for unbiased=True), (3) change dtype to float32 to satisfy MindSpore's supported dtypes, and (4) ensure both frameworks receive semantically identical parameters.
